'''shakadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuloside|kabuloside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuloside|kabuloside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shakadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækædhæth|shækædhæth]] || [[word:shækædhæj|shækædhæj]] || [[word:shækædhæsh|shækædhæsh]] || [[word:shækædhæ|shækædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakakadhath|shakakadhath]] || [[word:shakakadhaj|shakakadhaj]] || [[word:shakakadhash|shakakadhash]] || [[word:shakakadha|shakakadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakadhath|shakadhath]] || [[word:shakadhaj|shakadhaj]] || [[word:shakadhash|shakadhash]] || [[word:shakadha|shakadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakafdhafth|shakafdhafth]] || [[word:shakafdhafj|shakafdhafj]] || [[word:shakafdhafsh|shakafdhafsh]] || [[word:shakafdhaf|shakafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakadhatha|shakadhatha]] || [[word:shakadhaja|shakadhaja]] || [[word:shakadhasha|shakadhasha]] || [[word:shakadhaka|shakadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakadhath|shakadhath]] || [[word:shakadhaj|shakadhaj]] || [[word:shakadhash|shakadhash]] || [[word:shakadha|shakadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakadhathal|shakadhathal]] || [[word:shakadhajal|shakadhajal]] || [[word:shakadhashal|shakadhashal]] || [[word:shakadhakal|shakadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakadhaathatha|shakadhaathatha]] || [[word:shakadhaajaja|shakadhaajaja]] || [[word:shakadhaashasha|shakadhaashasha]] || [[word:shakadhaaka|shakadhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakadhathan|shakadhathan]] || [[word:shakadhajan|shakadhajan]] || [[word:shakadhashan|shakadhashan]] || [[word:shakadhakan|shakadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakadhathaoro|shakadhathaoro]] || [[word:shakadhajaoro|shakadhajaoro]] || [[word:shakadhashaoro|shakadhashaoro]] || [[word:shakadhakaoro|shakadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
